tasks.label: 🔥 Encender Docker y Levantar Proyecto
args: if (-not (Get-Process 'Docker Desktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Host 'Iniciando Docker... espera unos segundos ⏳'; Start-Process 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15 } else { Write-Host 'Docker ya está corriendo ✅' }; docker-compose up --build
